rationale: Fin. Code §31.006 governs liability of depository institution directors and personnel. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The provisions of the Business Organizations Code regarding liability, defenses, and indemnification of a director, officer, agent, or employee of a corporation apply to a director, officer, agent, or employee of a depository institution in this state.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict detected.
